title: Footfairy
desc: A CBI officer investigates murders committed by a serial killer with a foot fetish.

title: Faraaz
desc: Terrorists take a cafe in Dhaka hostage and the police try to de-escalate the situation.

title: Gold
desc: A passionate manager embarks the hockey team on a quest for independent India's first Olympic gold.

title: Madgaon Express
desc: Childhood friends Dodo, Ayush, and Pinku embark on a trip to Goa that goes completely off-track.

title: Mission Majnu
desc: A spy takes on a mission to expose a covert nuclear weapons program in the heart of Pakistan.

title: Laila Majnu
desc: Laila and Qais's love is tested by societal pressures and family expectations.

title: Gangubai Kathiawadi
desc: Forced into the flesh trade, a woman builds connections in the criminal world and rises to power.

title: Blurr
desc: A woman with progressive blindness investigates her twin sister's death.

title: Joggers' Park
desc: Chaos erupts when former judge Jyotin Chatterjee falls for Jenny, a young woman.

title: Joggers Park
desc: Jenny, a confident single woman, lives life on her own terms. Everything changes when a retired judge unexpectedly falls for her and enters her world.

title: Turtle
desc: Ramkaran churns the dry earth of a village in search of water to quench his thirst.

title: Turtle
desc: In a drought-struck village in Rajasthan, Ramkaran Choudhary churns the parched earth to extract water while the villagers indulge in a tug of war in desperation as they seek to quench their thirst.

title: India Lockdown
desc: The lives of four Indians are thrown into turmoil a nationwide lockdown is declared.

title: India Lockdown
desc: The stories of four individuals from different strata of society during the 21-day lockdown imposed by the Indian government in the wake of the COVID-19 pandemic.

title: Daddy
desc: Arun Gawli becomes one of India's most notable gangsters before he ventures into politics.

title: Daddy
desc: A street thug rises to feared don and later a political figure, as his complex life unfolds amid crime, loyalty, transformation, and public identity.

title: Udta Punjab
desc: The lives of four individuals intertwine during an era of drug abuse in Punjab, India.

title: Khuda Haafiz: Chapter 2 - Agni Pariksha
desc: Chaos erupts when Nandini, the adopted daughter of Sameer and Nargis, is abducted.

title: The Kashmir Files
desc: A young college student sets out to uncover the truth behind his parents' death.

title: Gaami
desc: Shankar embarks on a journey to the Himalayas to find a cure for a rare human condition.

title: Jawaani Jaaneman
desc: A womaniser mends his ways after a woman claiming to be his daughter enters his life.

title: Mission Raniganj
desc: An engineer leads a challenging rescue mission to save 65 miners trapped in a flooded coal mine.

title: Beyond the Clouds
desc: Tara pays a heavy price for taking help from the wrong person to protect her drug-dealing brother.

title: The Last Color
desc: 9-year-old Choti wishes to attend school but she faces struggle for daily survival. She befriends a widow who lives a life of abstinence. She later becomes an advocate and fights for societal reforms.

title: Buddha In A Traffic Jam
desc: A professor's idealism clashes with corrupt academia and corporate control, exposing the grim realities of politics, propaganda, and freedom in campus life.

title: Kites
desc: A wounded man searches for his sweetheart in the Mexican desert while on the run from the police, bounty hunters, and others.

title: U-Turn
desc: Mysterious deaths occur on a flyover after illegal U-turns, and journalist-intern Radhika investigates. However, a twist makes her the prime suspect, forcing her to clear her name.

title: Badhaai Do
desc: Shardul, a gay guy, and Suman, a lesbian woman, enter into holy matrimony to appease their families. However, when Suman's girlfriend moves in with them, their lives become more complex.
